data.name: A Systematic Study of Data Modalities and Strategies for Co-training Large Behavior Models for Robot Manipulation

data.description: A Systematic Study of Data Modalities and Strategies for Co-training Large Behavior Models for Robot Manipulation discusses Action Chunking with Transformers (ACT).
A Systematic Study of Data Modalities and Strategies for Co-training Large Behavior Models for Robot Manipulation mentions Diffusion Policy.
A Systematic Study of Data Modalities and Strategies for Co-training Large Behavior Models for Robot Manipulation studies Behavior Cloning.
